title: Introduction to CSS Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of the fundamental concepts and history of Cascading Style Sheets.

questions.question: What does CSS stand for?
options: Creative Style Sheets
Cascading Style Sheets
Computer Style Sheets
Colorful Style Sheets

questions.question: Which of these is the primary purpose of CSS?
options: To define the structure of the web page.
To define the visual presentation and layout of the web page.
To store data in a database.
To perform complex mathematical calculations.

questions.question: What does the 'Cascading' in CSS refer to?
options: The way images fall down the page.
The hierarchy of rules used to determine which styles are applied when multiple rules conflict.
The speed at which the page loads.
The method used to connect CSS to Java.

questions.question: Which of these is NOT a benefit of using CSS?
options: Improved website performance through caching.
Ensuring visual consistency across multiple pages.
Allowing for the separation of structure and design.
Automatically generating content for the website.

questions.question: The CSSOM (CSS Object Model) is combined with what other tree to create the browser's 'Render Tree'?
options: The JSON Tree
The DOM Tree
The HTTP Tree
The Font Tree
